content.text:
<user_query>
Explore three major feature areas in this React/TypeScript frontend codebase:

1. /Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/pages/Builder and /Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/builder - this is a page/form builder feature
2. /Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/pages/Storefront - storefront/checkout feature
3. /Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/pages/Dashboard and /Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/pages/DashboardV2 - dashboard with charts/analytics

For each area:
1. List the directory structure
2. Identify all major sub-features
3. Note key complexity indicators: drag-and-drop, custom rendering, charts, real-time updates, complex state, payment processing
4. Note complex third-party integrations (visx charts, recharts, react-beautiful-dnd, dnd-kit, konva canvas, etc.)
5. Approximate the number of components and code volume per area
6. Note any visual editor functionality (WYSIWYG, drag-drop, live preview)

Return a comprehensive summary with feature breakdowns and complexity assessments.
</user_query>

Exploring the three feature areas: listing directories, scanning dependencies, and estimating scale.

[REDACTED]

Here is a structured report based on read-only exploration of the repo.

---

## 1. Builder: `/Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/pages/Builder` + `/Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/builder`

### Directory shape (conceptual tree)

**`src/pages/Builder`** — admin UI for configuring “action pages” (the sample entry loads `type: 'event'` from editable page data):

- `index.tsx` — routes `:actionPageId/*` → `BuilderLayout` with nested panels  
- `components/` — `BuilderLayout`, `BuilderTopBar`, `BuilderSideBar`, `BuilderPreview`, panels (`DesignPanel`, `EventPanel`, `FinancePanel`, `FormPanel`, `TicketsPanel`, `SettingsPanel`, `WorkflowsPanel`), `TextEditor` (+ toolbar controls + `extensions/`), shared UI (`Toggle`, `SharePopover`, `ErrorSummary`, `FormGroup`), `builder.css`  
- `hooks/` — load/save/auto-navigation/create flows  
- `store/` — `useBuilderState.ts` (Zustand + `computedMiddleware`), `methods`, `types`, `schema/generateSchema.ts`, `adapters/*`, `useBuilderInput.ts`  
- `util.ts`, `util/`, `types.ts`

**`src/builder`** — **public-facing render layer** reused by preview and donate/storefront flows:

- `PublicActionPage/` → `ActionPageView/` (`ActionPageLayout`, `EventPageLayout`, bodies, forms, payment/donation blocks)  
- `PublicActionPage/components/` — large design system–style set: form controls, `PaymentMethodForm` (card, bank, Plaid, paper check, cash, PayPal wiring), `ExpressCheckout` (wallet buttons, signed-in flows), `DonationSelector`, address/Smarty, modals, etc.

### Major sub-features

| Area | What it covers |
|------|----------------|
| Panels | Design, finance (funds/giving/payment tabs), events, tickets + discounts/promos, form fields, workflows, settings |
| Rich text | TipTap-based editor with custom extensions (e.g. `BoxNode`), bubble menu for links |
| Reordering UX | Drag overlays and sortable zones for content blocks, sponsors, form fields, donation presets, funds, ticket groups/types |
| Preview | Debounced export from builder history → renders real `ActionPageLayout` from `src/builder` with mobile/desktop sizing |
| State | Undo/redo history, dirty/errors, schema generation, adapters from API shapes |

### Complexity indicators

- **Drag-and-drop**: **Yes** — `@dnd-kit/core`, `@dnd-kit/sortable`, `@dnd-kit/modifiers` across design content, form lists, donation amounts, funds, tickets.  
- **Custom rendering**: **Yes** — rich preview pipeline (`exportPreviewData`), many field-specific editors.  
- **Charts**: **No** in these two folders (charts live on dashboards).  
- **Real-time**: **No** persistent WebSockets called out; preview updates on debounced store changes.  
- **Complex state**: **Yes** — Zustand with computed derived state, full history stack, dirty/validation maps.  
- **Payment**: **Heavy in `src/builder`** — wallet flows (Apple/Google/PayPal), Plaid bank link, masked card inputs, `card-validator`; card data goes through **`vaultToken`** (server-side vaulting pattern, not Stripe Elements in `CreditCardForm`).  

### Notable third-party / integration-style deps (observed)

- **TipTap** (`@tiptap/react`, starter kit, extensions)  
- **@dnd-kit** (sortable drag-drop)  
- **lodash.debounce**, **clsx** (preview)  
- **Smarty** (address autocomplete/verify via `@state/addresses`)  
- **Plaid** (link + bank account form)  
- **GoogleMapsEmbedIframe**, wallet/PayPal components  

(No **Konva**, **react-beautiful-dnd**, or **`@visx`/`recharts`** in these builder paths from the scans.)

### Scale (approximate)

| Location | `.ts`/`.tsx` files (glob) | `.tsx` only (glob) |
|----------|---------------------------|---------------------|
| `src/pages/Builder` | **~160** | **~116** |
| `src/builder` | **~498** | **~334** (includes `.test.tsx`, `.stories.tsx`) |

**Rough volume**: `pages/Builder` is on the order of **tens of thousands of lines** of TS/TSX (many medium-sized components + store). `src/builder` is **larger** (nearly **500** TS/TSX modules, many granular components and tests).

### Visual / WYSIWYG

- **WYSIWYG**: TipTap rich text with formatting toolbar.  
- **Drag-drop**: Extensive reordering in multiple panels with drag overlays.  
- **Live preview**: `BuilderPreview` mirrors public layout with debounced (~500 ms) updates from undo history.

---

## 2. Storefront: `/Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/pages/Storefront`

### Directory shape

- `Storefront.tsx` — `CartProvider` (`react-use-cart`), resolves `storefront` action page (`useShowActionPage`), merges overrides (checkout CTA copy, recurring disabled, centered form, etc.), routes  
- `Products/` — listings, featured, cards, overlays, selectors (color/size), hooks for ACE product data  
- `CartDrawer/` — drawer + checkout navigation  
- `CartView/` — line items, discount code  
- `Checkout/` — composes **`ActionPageBody`** from **`@pages/ActionPages/pages/PublicActionPage/...`** (not only `src/builder`), cart→form relay (`CartRelay`), totals  
- `ProductDetails/` — detail view + forms  
- `hooks/` — cart totals, checkout navigation, images, products  

(~**49** files total in folder per glob.)

### Major sub-features

- Product browsing (featured + all products), overlays, PDP-style flows  
- Client cart with **`react-use-cart`**  
- **Checkout** routes to **`/checkout/`** path and reuses donate/action-page checkout body with storefront-specific field wiring (`amountAllocationsAttributes`, `aceProductSelectionsAttributes`, `storefrontProductSelectionsAttributes`)

### Complexity indicators

- **Drag-and-drop**: **No**  
- **Custom rendering**: **Moderate** — product cards, overlays, responsive layout (`Chakra` breakpoints)  
- **Charts**: **No**  
- **Real-time**: **No** (standard data fetching + cart state)  
- **Complex state**: **Moderate** — cart context + react-hook-form bridge in checkout  
- **Payment**: **Delegated** — actual payment UX is inherited from shared action-page checkout stack (often overlapping with **`src/builder`** public components elsewhere in the repo)

### Third-party highlights

- **`react-use-cart`**  
- **`Chakra`** (`useDisclosure`, layout)  
- **`react-router-dom`**, **`react-helmet-async`**, **`DOMPurify`**  
- **i18next**  

### Scale

- **~49 files** → on the order of **~35–45** `.tsx` components/hooks combined; **low thousands of lines** total for this slice (much smaller than builder).

### Visual editor

**None** in the storefront-only folder beyond standard product/catalog UI — no TipTap/builder preview here.

---

## 3. Dashboard: `/Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/pages/Dashboard` + DashboardV2: `/Users/duhl/git/anedot-frontend/src/pages/DashboardV2`

### `Dashboard` (v1) — directory shape

- `Dashboard.tsx` — **`flexlayout-react`** docking layout persisted in **`localStorage`**, **`react-resize-detector`**, onboarding nudge → setup  
- `Metrics/` — `MetricsGrid`, `Metric`, loaders; tiles: Balance, MonthlyRevenue/Donations, NextTransfer, totals  
- `Widgets/` — **`RevenueWidget`** (`@visx/xychart` line/bar toggle), **`SourcesWidget`** + **`PieChartWidget`** (`@visx/shape` pie, `@visx/legend`, **`d3-scale-chromatic`**)  
- `MakeATransferModal/`  
- `hooks/useAccountSummaryComparison.ts` — shapes data for charts  
- `defaultDashboardLayout.ts`, `FlexLayout.css`  

(~**32** files.)

### `DashboardV2` — directory shape

- `Dashboard.tsx` — header with **`@number-flow/react`** balance animation  
- `components/` — `MetricsGrid`, `MetricsCard`, **`MonthlyRevenueChart`** (**`recharts`**: `BarChart`, `ComposedChart`, toggles), **`RevenueSourcesChart`** (**custom CSS “stacked bar” + legend**, no Recharts in that file)  
- `hooks/useDashboardData.ts` — **`useGetAccountSummary`** with **`refetchInterval` / `staleTime` default **30 s** (polling)  

(~**10** files.)

### Major sub-features

| Version | Highlights |
|---------|----------------|
| V1 | Draggable/tabbed dock layout; Visx charts; metric cards; comparison hook for weekly/monthly series |
| V2 | Simpler vertical page; **Recharts** for monthly revenue trend; branded horizontal “revenue sources” bar; **polling** dashboard data |

### Complexity indicators

- **Drag-and-drop**: **V1 only** (layout docking — **FlexLayout**, not dnd-kit)  
- **Custom rendering**: **Yes** — tooltips, pie arcs (`MotionPieArc`), bespoke sources chart in V2  
- **Charts**: **Yes** — **`@visx/xychart`**, `@visx/shape`/group/legend, **`recharts`**, **`d3-scale-chromatic`**  
- **Real-time**: **Not true realtime** — **React Query**; V2 explicitly **polls every 30s**; V1 summary hook defaults to long **`staleTime`/`refetchInterval`** (**60 min** in `useGetAccountSummary` defaults unless overridden — V1 comparisons use same query pattern unless configured elsewhere)  
- **Complex state**: **Low–moderate** — mostly server data + layout JSON in LS (V1)

### Third-party highlights

- **flexlayout-react** (V1)  
- **@visx/curve**, **@visx/tooltip**, **@visx/xychart**, **@visx/group**, **@visx/legend**, **@visx/shape**, **@visx/scale** (V1)  
- **recharts** (V2 `MonthlyRevenueChart`)  
- **@number-flow/react** (V2)  
- **react-query** (`useGetAccountSummary`)

### Scale

| Area | Files (approx.) | Components |
|------|-----------------|------------|
| `pages/Dashboard` | **32** | ~10–15 substantive UI modules + barrels |
| `pages/DashboardV2` | **10** | **4** chart/layout exports in `components/index.ts` + page |

**Rough volume**: **Few thousand lines** for V1 (Visx widgets are sizeable); **V2 is small** (**~hundreds of lines per large chart file** plus thin layout).

### Visual editor

**Neither** dashboard is a WYSIWYG page builder — only **interactive charts** and **dockable widgets** (V1).

---

## Cross-cutting complexity assessment

| Area | Size | Hardest axes |
|------|------|----------------|
| **Builder (`pages` + `src/builder`)** | **Largest** | History/undo store, adapters, TipTap extensions, pervasive dnd-kit, shared public donate/event/payment stack |
| **Storefront** | **Smallest slice** | Clean separation: relies on upstream checkout; cart↔form mapping is the main bespoke logic |
| **Dashboard V1 vs V2** | **Moderate vs small** | V1 = layout persistence + Visx composition; V2 = polling + mixed Recharts/custom visualization |

---

**Caveats**: Component counts omit duplicate `.ts` barrels and story/test files bundled in globs under `src/builder`. Exact line totals would need `cloc`/git stats (not run here under strict read-only file ops).

[REDACTED]
